From Peninsula Boulevard businesses to the residential streets near Woodmere Country Club, we protect properties throughout this Nassau County community.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat drain flies in my Woodmere home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Woodmere and the Five Towns area. Our technicians can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call to assess and begin treatment of your drain fly problem.

faqs.question: What does drain fly treatment include for $350-$550?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection of all drains and moisture areas, identification of breeding sites, professional-grade bio-enzyme treatments, mechanical cleaning of affected drains, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete elimination. Pricing varies based on property size and infestation severity.

faqs.question: Why are drain flies common in Woodmere properties?
faqs.answer: Woodmere's proximity to water, humid Long Island climate, and many older homes with established plumbing systems create ideal conditions for drain flies. They breed in the organic buildup inside drains, particularly in basements, bathrooms, and bar areas that may not be used regularly.

faqs.question: How can I prevent drain flies from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: We provide detailed prevention guidelines including regular drain cleaning, proper ventilation in humid areas, and monthly bio-enzyme maintenance treatments. Our technicians will identify problem areas specific to your Woodmere property and recommend customized prevention strategies to keep drain flies away permanently.
